name: www.burdettedental.com
message: Burdette Dental Laboratory, located in Birmingham, Alabama, has over 50 years of experience providing high-quality restorative dental solutions to clients in Alabama and the Southeast region. They specialize in a range of products including crowns, bridges, dentures, and implants, utilizing the latest CAD/CAM technology to ensure superior outcomes for patients. The laboratory prides itself on exceptional service and offers convenient options such as free pickup and delivery for local practices. Their dedication to quality, service, and technological advancements makes them a trusted partner for dental professionals.
